message:
fix(docs): escape brackets and angle brackets in rustdoc comments (process_triage-ica.2.1)

Escape [pid], [0,1], [i][j], [θ], <pid>, and similar patterns in doc
comments to eliminate all rustdoc warnings. cargo doc now builds
warning-clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
